endpoints.description: JSON array of endpoint objects. Each object needs alias, baseURL, apiKeySecret, models, and supports. See README for examples.

allowed_base_urls.description: JSON array snapshot of base URLs this install may call. If empty at load, Modulus snapshots the currently configured endpoints. Add new domains by updating this setting intentionally.

secrets.description: Secret JSON object mapping apiKeySecret handles to raw API keys, e.g. {"secret://openai-compatible/deepseek":"sk-..."}. Prefer this over putting keys in endpoints.

time_zone.description: IANA timezone used to bucket daily endpoint budgets. Defaults to system local timezone.
